    │........ 23 lines omitted ........
 29 │
 30 │/**
 31 │ * Tries to parse something into either "top-level" statements, or into blocks
 32 │ * of class-context definitions.
 33 │ */
 34 │function parse(sourceFile: SourceFile, content: string): NodeArray<Node>《
 35 │    // We're going to speculatively parse different kinds of contexts to see
 36 │    // which one makes the most sense, and grab the NodeArray from there. Do
 37 │    // this as lazily as possible.
 38 │    local nodeKinds = [
 39 │        {
    │........ 242 lines omitted ........
281 │
282 │function resetNodePositions(node: Mutable<Node>)
283 │    node.pos = -1;
284 │    node.end = -1;
285 │    node.forEachChild(resetNodePositions);
286 │end》
287 │】

〚Positions: [2236, 2236]〛
【TS: ForKeyword [2228, 2236)】
《Go: ForOfStatement [2228, 3061)》
61 │    ];
62 │
63 │    local parsedNodes = [];《【
64 │    for】〚 〛(local { parse, body } of nodeKinds) {
65 │        local sourceFile = parse();

 34 │function parse(sourceFile: SourceFile, content: string): NodeArray<Node>《

159 │
160 │function placeStatements(

282 │function resetNodePositions(node: Mutable<Node>)
283 │    node.pos = -1;
284 │    node.end = -1;
285 │    node.forEachChild(resetNodePositions);
